steps.expected: Drills page with Start Drill button
steps.observed: Drills page loaded with filter options and Start Drill button

evidence.indexedDB: Session record created in 'ACS2906Learning' database, 'sessions' object store with startedAt timestamp present

steps.observed: Drill summary page displayed with Overview, By Concept, Misconceptions, Remediation tabs
Session record has endedAt: 2026-03-31T08:41:57.044Z, itemsCompleted: 10, correctCount: 1

evidence.indexedDB: Session record updated with endedAt timestamp and stats (itemsCompleted: 10, correctCount: 1)

assertions.title: Duration Tracked

steps.action: Query IndexedDB session record after drill completion
steps.expected: Session has duration field with seconds value within 5 seconds of actual elapsed time
steps.observed: Session record has startedAt: 2026-03-31T08:32:28.399Z and endedAt: 2026-03-31T08:41:57.044Z (568.645 seconds elapsed) but NO duration field present

evidence.indexedDB: Session record fields: userId, mode, startedAt, topics, itemsCompleted, correctCount, id, endedAt - NO duration field

assertions.issues: The session record does not contain a 'duration' field as specified in the validation contract. While startTime (startedAt) and endTime (endedAt) are present and can be used to calculate duration, the assertion requires a 'duration field' to be stored in seconds.

frictions.description: Answer options not visible in accessibility tree snapshot for some questions - required using text search to find and click options

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 2 passed (P3-SESSION-001, P3-SESSION-002), 1 failed (P3-SESSION-003: duration field missing from session record). Session tracking works - records created on drill start with startedAt, updated on completion with endedAt and stats. However, the duration field is not being persisted, which is required by the validation contract.
